tools.mdcat: Formats source files into markdown for GPT chat
tools.pext: Extracts User prompts from ChatGPT chats (in json)
tools.aug: Augment AI Pipeline - Process chat exports through extraction, analysis, and schema generation
tools.aug-recap: Extract essence from AugmentedAI plugin chats
tools.export-chats: Export chats from json chats file
tools.rsum: React Summary - Analyzes React component and test files to generate structured summaries
tools.pysum: Python project structure generator - Creates Markdown documentation from Python files
tools.lsproj: Project file lister - Uses .projlist config for pattern-based file discovery
tools.git-recent: Extract recent commits with diffs for AI analysis, excluding build artifacts
tools.aireview: AI-powered code review and pre-push validation tool
tools.chatmap:
Map LLM conversation branches from Google AI Studio JSON exports (timeline/tree/html views)

# Select by index
chatmap prompt_extractor/ --select 1

# Select by partial name match
chatmap prompt_extractor/ --select "aforyzm"

# With output file and view options
chatmap prompt_extractor/ --select "Branch" --view tree -o output.md

# Error handling shows available conversations
chatmap prompt_extractor/ --select "nonexistent"
tools.summarize.ts: TypeScript code summarizer - Removes function bodies while preserving signatures
